text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... This year's Takarazuka Kinen... is gonna be held... in Kyoto!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's right after the spring Tenno... so the track'll
be all beat up! ...And that's gonna make the race
real demanding!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, Ryan. So even on your days off you come
and train at the gym, then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright! Yep, well, the big day's coming up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hard work doesn't always get you results. But if
you want to win, you do have to work hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want you and Dober to come watch
the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've prepped a present for you both. And I can
give it to you at the Takarazuka.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course. The two of us will absolutely be there
to see you shine. And I imagine we'll learn
something from it as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But if I end up losing after getting your hopes
up... Sorry in advance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Oh, Ryan. Your jests are terribly funny,
you know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Takarazuka Kinen arrives.

text_block_list.name: Spectator in Suit
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, but what time does Ines Fujin's race
begin today?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's the main race for today, so it won't
start until after 3:30! Are you one of Fu's fans,
then?

text_block_list.name: Spectator in Suit
text_block_list.text:
Well... Yes, I am. I'd very much like to cheer her
on at a real racecourse, you see.

text_block_list.name: Spectator in Suit
text_block_list.text:
...In truth, she's my subordinate. She works
part-time in our delivery department.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Really?! She works at my place, too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What?! No way! My boss at the ramen shop and
my manager at my part-time job are getting
buddy-buddy?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So they hit it off here at the venue and now
they're supporting me from the stands... How
does that even happen?!
choice_data_list:
It's nice of them to come all the way out to
Kyoto.

It's nice of them to come all the way out to
Kyoto.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm just surprised that they'd both make the
trip just to cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(But if they're here because they're dreaming
through me too, then...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...I can't let them down.
choice_data_list: Let everyone's support be your strength!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, you're right! I'm gonna do just that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (Ryan and McQueen are both racing today.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (But so am I...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Here they come!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: McQueeeeen! Ryaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I don't even need a good look at Ryan to tell
how much stronger she's gotten since the spring
Tenno Sho... Those muscles are intense.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(And it's not just her physical strength that's
improved. She's way more focused, too...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen isn't the only runner in the Mejiro
family! And at the Takarazuka Kinen, I, Mejiro
Ryan, will show you that I'm not to be ignored!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Gulp.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(And it's not just her physical strength that's
improved. She's way more focused, too...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen isn't the only runner in the Mejiro
family! And at the Takarazuka Kinen, I, Mejiro
Ryan, will show you once again that I'm not to be
ignored!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Gulp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ines! I'm looking forward to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Haha, good point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Gotta start with a handshake... I'm not going to
lose, you know.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Me neither!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two competitors share a firm handshake as
the curtains rise on the Takarazuka Kinen!
